title: Der Rebell
director: Curtis Bernhardt, Edwin H. Knopf, Luis Trenker
writer: Henry Koster, Walter Schmidtkunz, Robert A. Stemmle
actors: Luis Trenker, Luise Ullrich, Victor Varconi
plot: A young medical student returns to his Tyrolean home to find out that Napoleon's troops have taken over the area and that his mother and sister have been murdered.
